title: Astralis Origins
description: Astralis is a celestial-themed addon for the Origins mod that introduces new playable Origins inspired by sunlight, moonlight, and the void in between. With deep lore, unique abilities, and branching evolution paths.
body:
! REQUIRES ORIGINS **FORGE 1.20.1** !

! THIS IS THE FIRST TIME MAKING AN ORIGINS ADDON. BUGS MAY BE PRESENT !

“Light births the day. Shadow rules the night. But only in twilight does true power awaken.”
________________________________________________________________________________________________

✨ 🔆 New Origins & Evolutions
🦊 Foxkin
Clever, nimble, and mysterious. Foxkin are masters of evasion and illusion, with natural speed boosts and stealth abilities tied to nature and trickery.

☀️ Sunborn
Radiant beings blessed by the sun. Gain strength, speed, and resilience in daylight, but weaken under the moon or eclipse. Their Solar Surge empowers them during the day.

🌙 Moonborn
Quiet, focused, and connected to the night. The Moonborn thrive in darkness and gain buffs under the moon. Their Moon Surge mirrors their solar siblings — but in shadow.

🌑 Eclipsebound (Event-Triggered Evolution)
The evolved form of Sunborn and Moonborn. Balanced between light and shadow, the Eclipsebound draw power during eclipses and twilight, gaining passive buffs and unique hybrid abilities from both the sun born and moon born 

🌘 Umbra Ascendant (Event-Triggered Evolution)
A rare, final evolution of the Eclipsebound. Existing in the stillness of totality, the Umbra Ascendant manipulates gravity, dampens sound, and channels pure eclipse energy. A true sovereign of silence and void.

🧬 What Makes Astralis Unique?
🌠 Evolution System – Origins evolve based on in-game conditions or choices.

🌓 Celestial Synergy – Sunlight and moonlight changes your power dynamically.

🌌 Custom Abilities –  Solar surges and Celestial powers.

🌒 Lore-Driven Design – Every Origin has rich backstory potential, perfect for immersive servers or story-based playthroughs.

💫 Compatible & Expandable – Built for Origins with compatibility in mind. Easily add it to your favorite modpacks!

 _______________________________________________________________________________________________

Coming soon: new origins, and bugfixes!

 _______________________________________________________________________________________________

💬 Feedback, suggestions, and ideas always welcome!
